Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: You pick the baguette with the nicest coloration out of the pile. A small chunk of it cracks effortlessly in your hands, and skims the top of the pale sauce.

Line.Text: French Kweebec appears to be waiting for you to take the first bite. He gestures as much once you make eye contact.

Choices.Text: [What's with the hesitation? Just go for it.]
[Nah, you can't do this.] I'm not hungry.
